title: Finding a Quiet Spot to Study

tree.setup: You're looking for a quiet place to study. Your classmate Xiao Jiang suggests the community library.
tree.setup_zh: 你在找一个安静的学习地方。同学小蒋建议去社区图书馆。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你要是想找安静的地方，社区图书馆很不错。人少、空调也好、还有免费的Wi-Fi。我昨天刚去过。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ yàoshi xiǎng zhǎo ānjìng de dìfang, shèqū túshūguǎn hěn búcuò. Rén shǎo, kōngtiáo yě hǎo, hái yǒu miǎnfèi de Wi-Fi. Wǒ zuótiān gāng qù guò.
turns.text_en: If you want somewhere quiet, the community library is great. Not many people, good air conditioning, and free Wi-Fi. I just went yesterday.

options.text_zh: 听起来很好！在哪里啊？我怎么不知道我们社区有图书馆。你要不要一起去？
options.text_pinyin: Tīng qǐlái hěn hǎo! Zài nǎlǐ a? Wǒ zěnme bù zhīdào wǒmen shèqū yǒu túshūguǎn. Nǐ yào bú yào yīqǐ qù?
options.text_en: Sounds great! Where is it? I didn't even know our community had a library. Want to go together?
options.feedback: Enthusiastic and invites her to join — study partner energy.

options.text_pinyin: Wǒ háishi qù kāfēi guǎn ba.
options.text_en: I'll just go to a café instead.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好啊！我也正想去写论文。就在小区东门旁边，走路五分钟。我们下午两点出发怎么样？
turns.text_pinyin: Hǎo a! Wǒ yě zhèng xiǎng qù xiě lùnwén. Jiù zài xiǎoqū dōngmén pángbiān, zǒulù wǔ fēnzhōng. Wǒmen xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn chūfā zěnmeyàng?
turns.text_en: Sure! I also need to work on my thesis. It's right next to the east gate of our complex — five minutes' walk. How about we leave at two this afternoon?

options.text_zh: 两点没问题！我带一些零食和水，学累了我们可以休息一下。
options.text_pinyin: Liǎng diǎn méi wèntí! Wǒ dài yīxiē língshí hé shuǐ, xué lèi le wǒmen kěyǐ xiūxi yīxià.
options.text_en: Two works! I'll bring snacks and water — when we get tired, we can take a break.

tree.cultural_note: Community libraries (社区图书馆) are quiet, free havens for students and self-learners in Chinese neighborhoods. Studying together with friends — bringing snacks, taking breaks — is a valued form of companionship. The mutual accountability helps both people stay focused.
